profile.headline: Ingenieur Mathematiques Appliquees Finance et Technologie CY TECH (ex EISTI) | Data Analyst Internship Natran (ex GRTgaz)
profile.summary: As an individual deeply committed to applied mathematics and computer science, I aim to further enhance my expertise by collaborating with interdisciplinary teams to address complex, real-world problems that are mathematically modeled and implemented through advanced computational solutions.
